purpose: External validation corpus for Terraform HCL/static and Terraform-plan reachability coverage.
note: The tool does not clone these projects automatically in unit tests. Use scripts/run_external_hcl_audit.sh in an environment with network access to clone and audit them.

projects.name: GoogleCloudPlatform terraform-google-cloud-run
projects.why_selected: Popular Google Cloud Terraform module that creates Cloud Run service, domain mapping, and invoker IAM resources.
expected_static_limitations: image is commonly a variable such as var.image until a concrete plan is generated
members may be variable-driven, so public invoker status can be unknown in static HCL mode

projects.name: Azure terraform-azure-container-apps
projects.why_selected: Official Azure module for Container Apps with container image, ingress, identity, secrets, and environment shapes.
expected_static_limitations: container image and ingress usually come from nested each.value objects
dynamic blocks are not expanded in static HCL mode

projects.name: aws-ia terraform-aws-ecs-fargate
projects.why_selected: AWS ECS/Fargate module shape that exercises ECS task/service, ALB, security group, and image URL patterns when planned.
expected_static_limitations: deploy/main.tf calls a local module, so a source-only audit of deploy/ primarily reports module expansion gaps
a full plan is needed to expand child module resources

projects.name: GoogleCloudPlatform terraform-ecommerce-microservices-on-gke
projects.why_selected: Open Google Cloud Jump Start Solution with GKE clusters, service accounts, IAM grants, and public ecommerce deployment context.
expected_static_limitations: the application workloads are Kubernetes YAML / downstream deployment assets, not only Terraform resources
cluster reachability does not imply package reachability without SBOMs for individual microservices

projects.name: aws-samples amazon-ecs-fullstack-app-terraform
projects.why_selected: Real fullstack Node/Vue application with Terraform-managed ECS services, task definitions, public ALBs, IAM, CodePipeline, DynamoDB, S3, and ECR.
expected_static_limitations: ECS task definition image values are template or pipeline driven until a concrete plan exists
CI/CD resources are supporting deployment context and should not be treated as application workloads

projects.name: aws-samples aws-ecs-cicd-terraform
projects.why_selected: Real Spring Petclinic application deployed to ECS/Fargate with Terraform and CodePipeline, useful for Maven source reachability plus AWS IaC context.
expected_static_limitations: application image identity is produced by the pipeline and is stronger in plan/runtime SBOM mode
database password and build pipeline settings are intentionally variable or external

projects.name: aws-containers retail-store-sample-app
projects.why_selected: Large real sample application with multiple services, source code, and Terraform deployment options for ECS, EKS, and App Runner.
expected_static_limitations: the Terraform tree includes multiple deployment variants, so source audit coverage is about visible resource support rather than one concrete deployment
Kubernetes manifests and Helm charts require separate manifest-aware analysis

projects.name: Azure-Samples container-apps-openai
projects.why_selected: Python chat applications deployed with Terraform-managed Azure Container Apps, Container Registry, private networking, Azure OpenAI, and managed identity.
expected_static_limitations: container image names usually come from registry module outputs and variables
private endpoint and Azure OpenAI resources provide blast-radius context, not package-level source reachability by themselves

projects.name: Azure-Samples container-apps-azapi-terraform
projects.why_selected: Real Azure Container Apps Terraform sample that uses the generic AzAPI provider, validating ARM-type classification instead of only provider-native azurerm resource names.
expected_static_limitations: generic azapi_resource blocks need ARM type inspection for semantic classification
container image evidence may be nested in encoded body objects or module variables
